mnemonics.title: GRANR Applications
mnemonics.content: **G**ames, **R**obotics, **A**utonomous Vehicles, **N**etwork/Resource Management, **R**ecommendation Systems - GranR covers the main RL application areas

mnemonics.title: RL Success Formula
mnemonics.content: **E**nvironment + **A**ction + **R**eward + **S**tate = **L**earning. Agents learn from experience in an environment by taking actions that change states and receive rewards.

mnemonics.title: Self-Play Learning
mnemonics.content: **S**elf-**P**lay **I**mproves **N**othing **G**radually **O**nly - Actually, Self-Play leads to infinite improvement in games like AlphaGo through iterative optimization

mnemonics.title: RL vs Others
mnemonics.content: **S**upervised **L**earns from **L**abels, **U**nsupervised finds **P**atterns, **R**einforcement learns from **T**rial and **E**rror - SLUP RTE for the three ML paradigms

mnemonics.title: Long-term Focus
mnemonics.content: **L**ooking **A**head **T**hrough **E**pisode **R**ewards - RL optimizes cumulative future rewards, not just immediate gains
